meaning: vt.鏀圭粍,閲嶅啓,閲嶆柊瀹夋帓
examples: I use this feature very often especially at weddings where you expose and lock the exposure then recompose and take the shot.
It will more than recompose you for all that you may have lost in the process, and you will be well satisfied with the outcome.
The important feature of tiles is the ability to recompose the page very easily without changing the underlying code components.
